cityDNA.coreFantasy: An Andean high-step city where sacred groves, temple platforms, archive towers, artisan guilds, manor courts, and condor-sun terraces bind mountain, jungle, memory, and elite duty.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Xol Atarah is not generic Meso/South-American fantasy; the uploaded images show a formal terraced civilization of sacred groves, archives, craft, temple processions, and high residences.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Xol Atarah turns Andean terraces, condor-sun symbolism, sacred ecology, temple rites, archives, guild production, and high-house gardens into civic order.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: White stone terraces, green jungle edges, blue sacred-grove beacons, condor-sun skyline forms, temple platforms, archive towers, guild courtyards, manor gardens, hanging gardens, and carved sun-disc courts.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: South American / Andean civic culture rooted in mountain steps, sacred groves, archive memory, craft legitimacy, and high-house responsibility.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Condor wings, sun terraces, sacred groves, temple stairs, archive seals, masterwork arcades, hanging gardens, and manor courts symbolize ascent under obligation.

canonLocks: Xol Atarah is a mature Andean high-step civic city, not generic jungle ruins.
The Wonder is Andean Condor-Sun Terrace of the High Steps.
The Beacon is Sacred Grove Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Sun Disc Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court.
The five primary districts are Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove, Religious / Temple Quarter, Records / Archives, Artisan Guilds, and High Residential.

Exact uploaded anchors include Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, Sacred Grove Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, Living Canopy Hall Nook, Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook, Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook, Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, Guildhall, Woven Banners Monument, Masterwork Arcade Nook, High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, and Salon Pavilion Nook.
provisionalCanon: Xol Atarah's highest civic virtue is remembered ascent.
rejectedReads: Andean visuals without archives, guilds, or high residential structures
cautionFlags: Preserve exact uploaded sidecar anchor names.
Keep high-step civic form distinct from VTS and THA.
Avoid flattening South American identity into generic ruins.

environment.environmentalLogic: Mountain steps and forest edges are made civic through groves, temple stairs, archives, guild courts, and manor gardens.

forms: Andean Condor-Sun Terrace of the High Steps
Sun Disc Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court
skyline: archive towers and high-step temples across green mountain terraces

civilization.people: Citizens are highland- and grove-literate, moving through ritual, record, craft, and elite garden spaces with formal civic awareness.
civilization.governance: Sun Disc Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court governs sacred groves, temple obligations, archive records, guild claims, and high-house petitions.
civilization.religion: Condor-sun rites, sacred grove ceremonies, temple processions, and high-step ascent rituals make public order sacred-adjacent.

streets.appearance: Terraced streets rise through sacred groves, temple stairs, archive plazas, guild work courts, and high residential gardens beneath condor-sun skyline forms.
streets.movement: Movement follows high steps, grove routes, procession stairs, archive courts, guild streets, and manor terraces.
streets.lighting: Mist, civic blue, sun-disc gold, and warm lanterns divide public institutions.
streets.weatherEffects: Rain and mountain mist make steps, drainage, and lanterns central to movement.
streets.dayCycle: Grove tending, temple rites, archive work, guild production, and manor petitions fill the day.
streets.nightCycle: Blue lamps, archive windows, temple lanterns, and quiet manor courts dominate night.

housing.wealthy: High terrace homes with garden courts, carved sun-disc lintels, and commanding views.
housing.middle: Guild, archive, temple, and market households along stepped civic streets.
housing.poor: Service housing near lower stairs, shared water, and work routes.

districts.name: Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove
districts.civicPurpose: Sacred ecology, public signal, and grove stewardship.
districts.visualIdentity: Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, Sacred Grove Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, Living Canopy Hall Nook.

districts.name: Religious / Temple Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Temple processions, high-step rites, and public worship.
districts.visualIdentity: Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook.

districts.name: Records / Archives
districts.civicPurpose: Public memory, legal continuity, copied truth, and archive authority.
districts.visualIdentity: Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook.

districts.name: Artisan Guilds
districts.civicPurpose: Craft legitimacy, masterwork display, and public production.
districts.visualIdentity: Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, Guildhall, Woven Banners Monument, Masterwork Arcade Nook.

districts.name: High Residential
districts.civicPurpose: Elite terrace gardens, manor influence, and public-facing hospitality.
districts.visualIdentity: High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook.

wonder.name: Andean Condor-Sun Terrace of the High Steps
wonder.symbolicRole: Ascent, sun, condor vision, and civic obligation made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Far skyline terrace-wonder of high steps and condor-sun forms above the city.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide rites, ascent ceremonies, and public memory.
storyHooks: A high-step rite reveals who is allowed to rise.

beacon.name: Sacred Grove Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Living sacred ecology as public signal.
beacon.visualRole: Blue beacon in sacred grove and terrace canopy.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates grove, temple, archive, guild, and manor response.
storyHooks: A grove signal contradicts the sun-disc court.

seatOfPower.name: Sun Disc Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Solar law and archive memory made government.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central court with sun-disc reliefs, terraces, and sealed records.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Governs grove rights, temple rites, archives, guild claims, and elite petitions.
storyHooks: A sun-disc record preserves the low path, not the high one.

majorLandmarks.name: Temple Platform
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Temple processions, high-step rites, and public worship.
storyHooks: A procession climbs the wrong step and reveals a buried law.

majorLandmarks.name: Archive Tower
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Public memory, legal continuity, copied truth, and archive authority.
storyHooks: A copyist record names the path nobody honors anymore.

majorLandmarks.name: Guildhall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Guildhall, Woven Banners Monument, Masterwork Arcade Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Craft legitimacy, masterwork display, and public production.
storyHooks: A masterwork shows the city remembers with hands as well as records.

majorLandmarks.name: Manor Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Elite terrace gardens, manor influence, and public-facing hospitality.
storyHooks: A manor court offer is really a route claim.

mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Andean Condor-Sun Terrace, Sacred Grove Beacon, and Sun Disc Reliefs Registry Court legible together.

elementsToAvoid: Andean identity flattened into generic fantasy
